title: Kala Ghoda – Premium Dark-Themed Nightclub Website

requirements.text: Implement a black-and-gold luxury design system across the entire app: deep black backgrounds (#0a0a0a, #111111), gold accent color (#C9A84C / #FFD700 range), bold serif or display font for headings (e.g. Cinzel or Playfair Display via Google Fonts), modern sans-serif for body text, gold hover effects on interactive elements, subtle gold glow animations on key UI elements, and smooth page transitions throughout.

quotes: Elegant black and gold aesthetic (luxury nightlife vibe)

acceptanceCriteria: All pages use deep black backgrounds with gold accent colors consistently
Headings render in a bold luxury display font loaded from Google Fonts
Interactive elements (buttons, links, cards) display gold hover/glow effects
Page transitions are smooth (fade or slide) between routes
Design is visually cohesive and premium across all pages

requirements.text: Build the Home Page with the following sections in order: (1) Full-screen hero section with an auto-playing looping background video (club atmosphere), the 'Kala Ghoda' logo/wordmark centered, tagline 'Where Nights Come Alive', and two CTA buttons: 'View Upcoming Events' and 'Book Now'; (2) About section with a short intro paragraph about the club; (3) Upcoming Events preview showing the 3 most recent upcoming events as cards (event poster image, title, date, short description); (4) Gallery preview section showing a grid of sample club images; (5) Contact section with a placeholder Google Maps embed, phone number, and Instagram link; (6) Footer with social media icons (Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp).

quotes: Hero section with full-screen background video
Club logo "Kala Ghoda" centered with tagline
CTA buttons: View Upcoming Events / Book Now

acceptanceCriteria: Hero video fills the full viewport, auto-plays muted and loops
'Kala Ghoda' logo/wordmark and tagline are centered over the hero
Both CTA buttons are visible and functional (navigate to Events page or Book Now flow)
About section renders introductory club description text
Upcoming events preview shows up to 3 event cards pulled from backend data
Gallery preview section displays a responsive image grid
Contact section includes an embedded map placeholder, phone number, and Instagram link
Footer displays Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp icons with placeholder links

requirements.text: Build a dedicated Events Page at route /events displaying all events in a responsive grid layout. Each event card must show: event poster image, event title, date and time, short description, and a 'View Details' button that navigates to the individual event page. Events with 'Upcoming' status should be listed first; 'Past' events should be visually distinguished (e.g. desaturated or labeled).

quotes: Each event card should include: Event poster image, Event title, Date & Time, Short description, "View Details" button

acceptanceCriteria: Route /events renders correctly
Events are fetched from the backend and displayed in a responsive grid
Each card shows poster image, title, date/time, short description, and 'View Details' button
Upcoming events are prioritized in sort order
Past events are visually differentiated from upcoming ones

requirements.text: Build an Individual Event Detail Page at route /events/:id. The page must include: a large full-width banner image (event poster), full event description, a horizontally scrollable or slider-style photo gallery for the event's uploaded photos (with lightbox on click), an embedded video player for the event video URL, a ticket price section, a prominent 'Book Now' button, and a live countdown timer showing days/hours/minutes/seconds until the event date.
acceptanceCriteria: Route /events/:id loads event data from backend by ID
Large banner image renders at full width
Photo gallery slider shows multiple event photos with lightbox on click
Embedded video player renders using the event's video URL
Ticket price is clearly displayed
'Book Now' button is prominent and styled with gold accent
Countdown timer accurately counts down to the event date/time and updates every second

requirements.text: Implement the backend data model and API for events. Each event must store: title, short description, full description, event date and time, ticket price, poster image (stored as base64 or URL), array of photo gallery images, video URL or embedded link, status (Upcoming | Past), and creation timestamp. Expose query functions to: list all events, get a single event by ID, and get the 3 most recent upcoming events for the home page.

quotes: Upload: Event poster image, Multiple event photos, Event video

acceptanceCriteria: Event data model includes all specified fields
listEvents query returns all events sorted by date
getEvent(id) query returns a single event or null
getUpcomingEvents(limit) returns the N most recent upcoming events
Data persists in stable backend storage

requirements.text: Implement backend update functions for event management: createEvent, updateEvent, deleteEvent, and toggleEventStatus. These must support all fields defined in the event data model.
acceptanceCriteria: createEvent inserts a new event and returns its ID
updateEvent modifies an existing event by ID
deleteEvent removes an event by ID
toggleEventStatus switches an event between Upcoming and Past
Only authenticated admin callers can invoke mutation functions

requirements.text: Build a secure Admin Dashboard at route /admin. Protect the dashboard with a hardcoded credential login screen (username + password stored in backend, no external auth). On login, store a session token in localStorage and validate it on each admin page visit. The dashboard must support: adding a new event (form with all fields), editing an existing event, deleting an event (with confirmation), uploading event poster, multiple gallery photos, and a video URL, toggling event status between Upcoming and Past.

quotes: Create a secure Admin Dashboard with login authentication
Upload: Event poster image, Multiple event photos, Event video
All events added from admin should automatically appear on: Home page, Events page, Individual event page

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin without a valid session redirects to /admin/login
Login form accepts credentials and stores session token on success
Admin dashboard lists all events with Edit, Delete, and Toggle Status actions
Add/Edit event form includes fields for all event data model properties
Photo upload supports selecting multiple images (stored as base64 or data URLs)
Deleting an event requires a confirmation step
Changes made in admin are immediately reflected on the Home, Events, and Event Detail pages

requirements.text: Add a smooth scroll-reveal animation system so that sections animate into view as the user scrolls down (fade-in + slight upward translate). Apply these animations to the About section, Upcoming Events cards, Gallery preview, and Contact section on the Home page, and to event cards on the Events page.
acceptanceCriteria: Elements off-screen are initially invisible
Sections animate in (fade + translate) as they enter the viewport during scroll
Animations trigger once and do not repeat on scroll-up
Animations do not cause layout shifts or performance issues

requirements.text: Add a floating WhatsApp booking button fixed to the bottom-right corner of every page. The button should link to a WhatsApp chat URL (wa.me/ format) with a pre-filled message like 'Hi, I'd like to book a table at Kala Ghoda'. Use a WhatsApp green icon with gold border styling to match the brand.
acceptanceCriteria: WhatsApp button is visible and fixed to bottom-right on all pages
Clicking the button opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled booking message
Button is styled with brand-consistent gold border and WhatsApp green
Button does not obscure critical page content

requirements.text: Add a Newsletter Subscription section on the Home Page (above the footer). It should include a heading like 'Stay in the Loop', a brief description, an email input field, and a 'Subscribe' button. Store subscriber emails in the backend with a subscribeNewsletter(email) function and a listSubscribers query for admin visibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Newsletter section renders above the footer on the Home page
Email input validates format before submission
On successful submission, a confirmation message is shown
Subscriber email is persisted in backend storage
Admin dashboard shows a count or list of subscribers

requirements.text: Generate static image assets for the application: (1) A hero background fallback image for the home page (in case the video cannot load), showing a cinematic nightclub interior in black and gold tones. (2) A 'Kala Ghoda' logo/wordmark in gold on transparent background. (3) Three placeholder event poster images in dark luxury style for the seeded demo events. (4) A gallery grid of 6 atmospheric nightclub photos for the home page gallery preview.

quotes: Hero section with full-screen background video

acceptanceCriteria: Hero fallback image renders correctly if video is unavailable
Logo image is displayed in the hero section and navbar
Three distinct event poster images are used for seeded demo events
Six gallery images populate the home page gallery grid
All images are served from frontend/public/assets/generated

requirements.text: Seed the backend with 3 demo events on first initialization so the app is visually populated on first load without requiring admin setup. Each demo event should have a title, description, date set in the near future, ticket price, poster image reference, and Upcoming status.

quotes: All events added from admin should automatically appear on: Home page (Upcoming section), Events page

acceptanceCriteria: On first canister initialization, 3 demo events are created automatically
Each demo event has all required fields populated
Demo events appear on the Home page upcoming section and Events page immediately
Seed data is not duplicated on subsequent upgrades

constraints: Use only Motoko for backend — no Node.js, Express, or MongoDB
Use only React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS for frontend — no Next.js
No external authentication providers — admin login must use hardcoded credentials checked against backend
No external email service for newsletter — store emails in backend only
No Google Maps SDK — use a static iframe embed placeholder
No Instagram API integration — use a static placeholder or link only
All generated images must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Real payment processing or ticketing system integration
Real Google Maps API with dynamic markers
JWT-based authentication (use simple session token pattern instead)
Rust, Python, or any non-Motoko backend language

required: Cinematic nightclub interior with dramatic lighting, dark atmosphere, gold and amber light rays, crowded dance floor viewed from above (hero-fallback.dim_1920x1080.png)
Elegant gold wordmark text 'KALA GHODA' in a bold luxury serif font on a transparent black background with subtle gold glow (logo-wordmark.dim_600x200.png)
Dark luxury event poster with abstract geometric gold patterns, DJ silhouette, bold text placeholder area, deep black background – Event 1 (event-poster-1.dim_600x800.png)
Dark luxury event poster with gold circular mandala motif, smoky atmosphere, deep navy-black gradient – Event 2 (event-poster-2.dim_600x800.png)
Dark luxury event poster with gold confetti explosion, champagne glasses silhouette, rich black background – Event 3 (event-poster-3.dim_600x800.png)
Atmospheric nightclub interior, crowd on dance floor, dramatic red and gold stage lighting (gallery-1.dim_800x600.png)
Close-up of a gold cocktail drink on a dark bar surface with bokeh background lights (gallery-2.dim_800x600.png)
VIP lounge area with plush dark velvet seating, gold accents, ambient low lighting (gallery-3.dim_800x600.png)
DJ booth with turntables, neon gold glow, crowd silhouettes in the background (gallery-4.dim_800x600.png)
Aerial view of a nightclub dance floor with laser light show in gold and white (gallery-5.dim_800x600.png)
Bartender pouring a glowing cocktail at a dark marble bar with gold fixtures (gallery-6.dim_800x600.png)
